description: Extra roomy and comfortable to carry, the textured leather effect fabric on this baggit bag will give a sophisticated look to any outfit. Height: 28 cm Width: 35 cm Depth: 14 cm Made of synthetic leather for durability with a busy print on the front, with pleating Two short handles for carrying ease attached to the bag One main compartment with a zippered separator and a zippered pocket inside One zippered pocket at the back Care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
